title: Google Home boss Anish Kattukaran called smart displays 'the ultimate form factor' for Gemini — but after using the semi-portable Pixel Tablet for three years, a static display would feel like a step backwards
summary: A new Google Home Display might be on the cards, but sticking to the traditional smart home hub format seems like a missed opportunity. Unlike a Google Home Display, the Pixel Tablet isn't just a hub, either.
